sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21117" key="*bruswnoqrasumaxeiolhyike/rmatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Βρῡσωνοθρᾰσῠμᾰχειοληψῐκέρμᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n21117.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taking coin like Bryso and Thrasymachus</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0450.tlg001:14:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
